name: INFORM Risk Index
role: Country risk score, hazard and exposure, vulnerability, and lack of coping capacity.

name: WorldRiskIndex
publisher: Buendnis Entwicklung Hilft / IFHV Ruhr University Bochum
role: Independent disaster risk index with exposure, vulnerability, susceptibility, coping, and adaptation dimensions.

name: OECD CRS DRR-related ODA
publisher: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
role: Official development assistance commitments and disbursements for CRS purpose codes 74010, 41050, and 41010.

name: World Bank Projects & Operations DRM project search
role: Project-level examples and full commitment amounts for World Bank projects tagged or described around disaster risk management.

name: Green Climate Fund Open Data Library DRR/resilience project screen
role: Country-linked GCF project signals selected by DRR/resilience tags and text, including GCF funding, co-finance, public/private sector, entities, and beneficiaries.

name: OCHA Financial Tracking Service humanitarian response funding
role: Current-year humanitarian response funding by destination country, shown as a separate response-context layer.

name: ThinkHazard
role: Screening-level hazard classifications for flood, earthquake, cyclone, heat, wildfire, tsunami, water scarcity, landslide, volcano, and related hazards.

name: World Bank indicator VC.IDP.NWDS
role: New internal displacements associated with disasters.

name: ND-GAIN Country Index
role: Climate adaptation score, vulnerability, and readiness.

name: Aqueduct 4.0 Country Rankings
role: Baseline water stress, river flood risk, drought risk, and future water-stress projections.

name: Our World in Data / EM-DAT disaster counts
role: Reported disaster counts by hazard type.

name: Our World in Data / EM-DAT economic damages
role: Global economic damage by disaster type.

name: Our World in Data / UNDRR Sendai indicators
role: Direct losses, national DRR strategy scores, and local government DRR strategy coverage.

name: DesInventar / DELTA Resilience
role: Subnational disaster loss records where country databases are available.

name: IATI activity and transaction data
role: Potential activity-level view of mainstreamed DRR and humanitarian/development finance after de-duplication across reporting organisations and transaction hierarchies.

name: Domestic public DRR budgets
role: Domestic DRR spending where governments publish budget tags, disaster funds, climate budget tagging, or Sendai-linked expenditure documents.

name: Private DRR and resilience finance
publisher: Climate funds, insurers, companies, banks, and project sponsors
role: Private-sector project and co-finance signals where public documents disclose resilience or DRR investment, not a complete total private finance measure.
